failed_launch.failure: The user systemd scope could not start because the detached controller lacked DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS and XDG_RUNTIME_DIR.

root_cause: The tmux-launched shell did not inherit the Linux user bus environment required by systemd-run --user.
remediation: The experiment launcher now reconstructs XDG_RUNTIME_DIR from the current UID and sets DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS when the user bus socket exists.
validation: The replacement c16 arm and the later c32 arm both started from detached shells, created their scopes, completed all 64 trajectories, and cleaned up their browser sessions. The failed launch created no task trajectory or remote browser session and was excluded from all comparisons.
